## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check` passes
- [ ] New behavior has tests
- [ ] No personal data in fixtures (neutral coordinates, timezones, names)
- [ ] `docs/architecture.md` / `README.md` updated if behavior changed
